header: One platform, built for every team
subheadline: See how product, marketing, support, and operations get more done in the same workspace.

items.title: Product teams
items.description: Plan roadmaps, track every release, and keep engineering and design on the same page.

items.title: Marketing teams
items.description: Run campaigns end to end, from brief to launch, with assets and approvals in one place.

items.title: Customer support
items.description: Triage tickets, share canned replies, and resolve issues faster with full context.

items.title: Operations
items.description: Standardize recurring processes and automate handoffs so nothing slips through.

items.title: Sales teams
items.description: Track deals, automate follow-ups, and forecast revenue from a single pipeline view.

items.title: Agencies
items.description: Manage every client account from one workspace with scoped permissions and shared templates.
